parameters.body:
={{ JSON.stringify({
  run_id: $json.run_id,
  company_domain: $json.company_domain,
  company_name: $json.company_name,
  composite_score: $json.composite_score,
  adjusted_score: $json.adjusted_score,
  pillars: $json.pillars,
  scores: $json.scores,
  reflection: $json.reflection,
  recommendation: $json.recommendation,
  key_risks: $json.key_risks,
  next_steps: $json.next_steps,
  risk_factors: $json.risk_factors
}) }}
